<!-- What would you like to see added or changed? -->

## Scope notes

<!-- Does this touch a bounded context boundary? Require a new adapter? Change the fitness-
     function catalog? If it affects an architectural decision in docs/adr/, say which one. -->

---

**Before submitting:** for changes that affect architecture (new adapters, new bounded
contexts, changes to the fitness-function catalog or the API contract), open a discussion
first. Small, focused changes with a clear scope are more likely to be accepted quickly.
